_meta.source: Wave A2 manual curation — 5 missing WC26 teams
confidence_flags: Ivory Coast GK Yahia Fofana: <80% confidence — first-choice at AFCON 2024 but rotation with Brou Brice Konan & Badra Ali Sangaré has been documented post-tournament.
DR Congo only proposes 2 tier_1_star entries (Mbemba + Wissa) — Bakambu/Bongonda/Masuaku status volatile enough to omit rather than fabricate.
Tunisia Hannibal Mejbri club listed as Burnley reflects 2024-25 loan; if he has moved on by the squad list publish, the club field should be re-verified before consumption.
Australia has no consensus tier_1_star at Mbappé/Bellingham level — entries represent best available headline internationals (captain + recognised regulars), not generational talents.
Australia Riley McGree as tier_1_star: <80% confidence — recognised regular but not at generational-talent level; consider downgrading to tier_2_starter if reviewer prefers stricter tier_1_star bar.
